concerns.text: FR-004 mandates 'Pearson correlation' but tasks T016 and plan Phase 3 implement 'Spearman rank correlation'. No task exists to implement the Pearson method required by the spec.
FR-005 mandates 'Benjamini-Hochberg FDR' but tasks T017 and plan Phase 4 implement 'cluster-based permutation tests'. No task exists to implement the BH procedure required by the spec.

FR-010 mandates 'cross-referencing spatial patterns' with indices, but tasks T019 and plan Phase 7 implement 'regression against scalar indices' and 'spatial correlation with templates'. The specific validation mechanism in the spec is not covered by any task.

FR-001 requires downloading 'global' data (1979–2023), but tasks T005 and plan Phase 0 restrict the domain to '20°N-60°N, 100°E-60°W'. No task exists to fetch the full global dataset required by the spec.

FR-003 requires Z500 anomalies via 'monthly climatology' subtraction only. Tasks T013 and plan Phase 1 add an unrequested 'linear detrending' step. No task exists to implement the spec's exact anomaly calculation without detrending.
Spec Assumptions define 'global latitudinal bands (90°S to 90°N)'. Tasks and plan only process a regional subset. No task exists to cover the global scope defined in the spec assumptions.
